title: helianthemum ledifolium var. pumilum
intro: Helianthemum ledifolium var. pumilum, also known as dwarf rockrose or low-growing rockrose, is a low-growing, spreading shrub in the family Cistaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum ledifolium var. pumilum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
